title: Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates in Vijayawada offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
